raw_consumer_statement: I filed a dispute with Citi on XXXX XX/XX/year> for {$9500.00}. My case ID is XXXX. The {$9500.00} was paid to an online XXXX XXXX for services never received. Since then Citi has closed the dispute once ( on XXXX XXXX ) saying I was responsible for the charge. I called Citi and reopened the dispute and emailed documentation to Citi on 13 different occasions in 13 different emails and also mailed Citi copies of the documentation showing that services were never received/rendered on XX/XX/XXXX. As of XX/XX/year> my dispute is still open.
